name: CLX - MGA Insurance Advisor Commissions v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. advisor session. Returns commission_ledger entries WHERE advisor_id = session_user with monthly bucket aggregation.

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const ctx = $json; let url = 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/commission_ledger?vertical_id=eq.insurance&select=id,policy_number,carrier_name,product_type,premium_amount,total_commission,advisor_commission,mga_commission,payout_status,payout_date,created_at'; if (ctx.user_role === 'advisor' || ctx.user_role === 'sub_agent') { url += '&advisor_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(ctx.advisor_id); } else if (ctx.user_role === 'mga_principal') { url += '&mga_principal_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(ctx.advisor_id); } url += '&order=created_at.desc&limit=500'; return url; })() }}
